# revokeOrgApiKey

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for revokeOrgApiKey

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useRevokeOrgApiKeyMutation(); mutate({ input: { keyId: '<UUID>', orgId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useRevokeOrgApiKeyMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useRevokeOrgApiKeyMutation();
mutate({ input: { keyId: '<UUID>', orgId: '<UUID>' } });
```
